originalTitle: Oppo’s Bubble is a thin round screen for taking rear camera selfies
summary: Oppo launched a new smartphone accessory that makes it easier to snap selfies using your smartphone's rear cameras that typically feature better sensors than front-facing cameras. The Bubble offers similar functionality to the recently announced Insta360 Snap with a screen providing live camera previews so you can properly frame shots, plus remote camera controls and […]
content: Oppo launched a new smartphone accessory that makes it easier to snap selfies using your smartphone’s rear cameras that typically feature better sensors than front-facing cameras. The Bubble offers similar functionality to the recently announced Insta360 Snap with a screen providing live camera previews so you can properly frame shots, plus remote camera controls and a shutter button. What sets the Bubble apart is a thinner design, wireless capabilities up to nearly 33 feet away, and, unfortunately, limited device compatibility. The Oppo Bubble is currently available in China for 499 yuan, or around $73, but the company hasn’t confirmed if the accessory will see a global release. It features a round AMOLED touchscreen with a 550mAh battery, but it’s only seven-millimeters thick. The company hasn’t specified the Bubble’s estimated battery life, but it needs to be charged through a USB-C port on the bottom instead of powering up wirelessly when attached to the back of a phone. [Image: The Bubble can display various 3D characters when not in active use, or you can create your own wallpaper from photos or videos. https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/oppobubble2.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] Some Oppo devices do support wireless charging, but the company hasn’t released any with built-in magnetic rings for attaching accessories. To dock the Bubble to an Oppo phone, you’ll need to add a magnetic case. The screen can also be attached directly to devices with embedded magnets like iPhones and recent Pixel phones, but Oppo has only made the Bubble compatible with a small assortment of its own devices including the Reno 14, 15, and 16, as well as the Find X8, X9, X9 Pro, and X9 Ultra, through an accompanying mobile app. The company hasn’t announced plans to expand the Bubble’s compatibility to devices from other companies.
chineseTitle: Oppo 的 Bubble 是一款薄薄的圆形屏幕，用于后置摄像头自拍
chineseSummary: Oppo 推出了一款新的智能手机配件，让您可以更轻松地使用智能手机的后置摄像头进行自拍，后置摄像头通常具有比前置摄像头更好的传感器。 Bubble 提供与最近发布的 Insta360 Snap 类似的功能，其屏幕提供实时相机预览，以便您可以正确地拍摄照片，此外还有远程相机控制和 [...]
chineseContent: Oppo 推出了一款新的智能手机配件，可以更轻松地使用智能手机的后置摄像头进行自拍，后置摄像头通常具有比前置摄像头更好的传感器。 Bubble 提供与最近发布的 Insta360 Snap 类似的功能，其屏幕提供实时相机预览，以便您可以正确地进行拍摄，此外还有远程相机控制和快门按钮。 Bubble 的独特之处在于更薄的设计、无线功能可达近 33 英尺，但不幸的是，设备兼容性有限。 Oppo Bubble 目前在中国的售价为 499 元（约合 73 美元），但该公司尚未确认该配件是否会在全球发布。它配备圆形 AMOLED 触摸屏和 550mAh 电池，但厚度仅为 7 毫米。该公司尚未具体说明 Bubble 的预计电池寿命，但它需要通过底部的 USB-C 端口充电，而不是连接到手机背面时无线供电。 [图片：Bubble 在不使用时可以显示各种 3D 角色，或者您可以从照片或视频创建自己的壁纸。 https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/oppobubble2.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] 一些 Oppo 设备确实支持无线充电，但该公司尚未发布任何带有用于连接配件的内置磁环的设备。要将 Bubble 与 Oppo 手机对接，您需要添加磁性外壳。该屏幕还可以直接连接到带有嵌入式磁铁的设备，例如 iPhone 和最近的 Pixel 手机，但 Oppo 仅通过随附的移动应用程序使 Bubble 与一小部分自家设备兼容，包括 Reno 14、15 和 16，以及 Find X8、X9、X9 Pro 和 X9 Ultra。该公司尚未公布计划
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
